shared_properties: Asset remains readable at 1x scale within the warm cage scene.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering and 1px outlines keep interaction targets crisp.
differences: This effect supports cleanup completion with a bright sparkle sequence.
Four frames give a quick reward beat after cleaning input.
Spark shapes must stay readable without exceeding the tiny effect footprint.

reference_images.label: behavior_system_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds effect timing and state-linked particle usage.

reference_images.label: art_direction_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds palette discipline, pixel density, and warm household presentation.

reference_images.label: cage_object_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds cage-prop placement and relative scale inside the 128x128 enclosure.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas-driven sprite entity with fixed virtual-pixel scaling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load effect_sparkle_clean_4f.png via AssetServer during Loading state, then bind handles by task_id for deterministic system lookup.
runtime_notes: Use nearest-neighbor sampling and a 128x128 virtual canvas so every authored pixel remains crisp after upscale.
Drive state swaps through atlas index changes or visibility toggles instead of runtime repainting to preserve palette invariance.
Attach marker components so CareSystem, BehaviorSystem, TimeSystem, and HUD systems can target the asset without filename inference.

context.usage: Short-lived particle spawned near Echo; drifts upward by 8px and fades.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 32x8px (4 frames × 8x8) with 0px spacing.
Every frame contains at least 4 opaque pixels for readability.
Uses only the listed colors and transparency; no gradients or anti-aliasing.
